hooks.command: p=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$p" in *.py|*.rs|*.sh|*.c) printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"{\"error_id\":\"HEXA-FIRST-AI-1\",\"error_class\":\"native_lang_creation_blocked\",\"_DIRECTIVE_TO_AI_AGENT\":\"STOP. nexus is HEXA-FIRST. Do NOT create .py/.rs/.sh/.c via Write or Edit. Author the equivalent as tool/<name>.hexa instead.\",\"_AI_NATIVE_GUIDANCE\":{\"if_authoring_new_tool\":\"Write tool/<name>.hexa instead. Run via shared/bin/hexa.\",\"if_porting_existing\":\"Edit on existing files is allowed; only NEW Write is blocked. Do not workaround by creating a new path with the same content.\",\"if_test_fixture\":\"Place under tool/lint_test_fixtures/ and rename to .py.fixture, OR get explicit user exemption.\",\"next_step\":\"Author .hexa equivalent OR ask user for explicit exemption per file.\",\"anti_patterns\":[\"writing tool/foo.py to scaffold a new tool\",\"copying .py.bak to .py to bypass\",\"chmod +x then writing .sh script\"]},\"audit_log\":\"state/sandbox_breaches.jsonl\",\"harness\":\"shared/tool/entry.hexa pretool\"}"}}' ;; esac

p=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$p" in *.githooks|*.githooks/*) printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"{\"error_id\":\"GH-DISABLED-OS-1\",\"_DIRECTIVE_TO_AI_AGENT\":\"STOP. .githooks is OS-level disabled (commits e3137be2/fa1de8e2/582f791e). Read /Users/ghost/core/nexus/.githooks JSON body for runbook. Do NOT bypass.\",\"harness\":\"shared/tool/entry.hexa\"}"}}' ;; esac
